title: Senior Operations Manager
description:
Role Summary

  • Senior Account Delivery Lead, managing global delivery across APAC, EMEA, and the Americas

  • Oversee strategic client engagement and end-to-end delivery across Digital Marketing, QaaS, Product Validation, Market Studies, and CX Operations

  • Lead multi-functional teams supporting voice and chat-based contact centres

  • Drive service excellence aligned to KPIs, SLAs, and business outcomes

Key Responsibilities

  • Own global account delivery and act as primary escalation point for senior stakeholders

  • Lead contact centre quality programs (voice & chat) using QaaS and Six Sigma (DMAIC) methodologies

  • Drive continuous improvement through quality scorecards, performance metrics, and feedback loops

  • Deliver actionable insights using Google Looker Studio, Tableau, and Power BI

  • Support account growth, renewals, RFPs, and digital transformation initiatives

  • Establish governance, standardize best practices, and ensure operational consistency

  • Lead, mentor, and build high-performing global teams

Qualifications

  • 15+ years’ experience in CX operations, digital marketing, quality management, or product validation

  • Proven leadership in global contact centre quality (voice & chat)

  • Strong expertise in Six Sigma (Green/Black Belt preferred)

  • Advanced analytics and dashboarding using Looker Studio, Tableau, and Power BI

  • Experience managing multi-million-dollar, multi-region accounts

    EA Number: 11C4879

postedCompany.description:
Headquartered in Singapore, we are one of Asia Pacific’s leading organizations, providing technology consulting, software development and outsourcing services, with operations in 5 countries across the region and with development centres in Singapore, Malaysia and India.

Apar Technologies is a part of the Apar Group, a billion dollar industrial conglomerate and managed by Basil Partners, a successful technology venture fund.

Apar combines a passion for client satisfaction, deep industry and technology expertise and a global workforce working in an honest and ethical work environment to deliver value.

Our four growth platforms—Technology consulting, Business intelligence, Collaboration and Cloud and big data—are the innovation engines through which we build world-class skills and capabilities and create, acquire and manage key assets central to the development of world class services and solutions for our clients.

Apar aims to be the preferred business partner of global companies, helping them create best – in- class technology and business solutions.
postedCompany.name: APAR TECHNOLOGIES PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
